eventStreams.name: GridTelemetry
eventStreams.description: Real-time substation load and voltage readings
kqlAggregations: GridTelemetryEvents | summarize AvgLoad=avg(LoadMW), MaxLoad=max(LoadMW), AlarmCount=countif(IsAlarm) by SubstationID, bin(Timestamp, 1m)
GridTelemetryEvents | summarize PeakLoad=max(LoadMW), AvgVoltage=avg(VoltagekV) by SubstationID, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

eventStreams.name: SCADAEvents
eventStreams.description: SCADA system events from power plants
kqlAggregations: SCADAEvents | where Severity in ('Critical', 'High') | summarize AlertCount=count() by PlantID, EventType, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
SCADAEvents | summarize AvgValue=avg(Value), MaxValue=max(Value) by PlantID, SensorName, bin(Timestamp, 15m)

eventStreams.name: BillingTransactions
kqlAggregations: BillingTransactionEvents | summarize TotalAmount=sum(Amount), TxnCount=count() by TransactionType, bin(Timestamp, 1h)

bridgeQueries.name: GridLoadBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge hot telemetry with cold Lakehouse grid data

bridgeQueries.name: PlantHealthBridge
bridgeQueries.description: Bridge SCADA events with generation fact table
